sourcesContent:
import create from 'zustand'

export const useStore = create(set => ({
  openChats: [], // [{id, user, zIndex}]
  nextZ: 100,
  contacts: [],
  setContacts: (c) => set({contacts: c}),
  openChat: (chat) => set(state => ({openChats: [...state.openChats, {...chat, zIndex: state.nextZ}], nextZ: state.nextZ+1})),
  focusChat: (id) => set(state => ({openChats: state.openChats.map(c => c.id===id ? {...c, zIndex: state.nextZ} : c), nextZ: state.nextZ+1})),
  closeChat: (id) => set(state => ({openChats: state.openChats.filter(c=>c.id!==id)}))
}))
